step_by_step_reasoning: Based on the whiteboard and the transcript, the developer triggers the pipeline by committing code to CodeCommit. CodePipeline orchestrates the flow. CodeBuild compiles the code and pushes the container image to ECR (Registry). CloudFormation then runs a 3-step process (ChangeSet, Approve, Execute) to provision the resources in the customer VPC, including ECS, ALB, and IAM roles. I will map the Developer, CodePipeline, CodeCommit, CodeBuild, CloudFormation, ECR, and the resources inside the VPC (VPC boundary, ECS, ALB, IAM).

graph.name: Etion automated multi-tenant deployment pipeline
graph.notes: Automated deployment pipeline leveraging CodePipeline, CodeBuild, and CloudFormation to consistently deploy isolated tenant workloads to separate VPCs containing ECS, ALB, and IAM resources.

nodes.name: Developer
nodes.notes: Developer commits infrastructure and application code modifications.

nodes.name: AWS CodePipeline
nodes.notes: Orchestrates the build and deployment pipeline stages.

nodes.name: AWS CodeCommit
nodes.notes: Version control repository for application code and CloudFormation templates.

nodes.name: AWS CodeBuild
nodes.notes: Builds docker images on demand inside short-lived containers.

nodes.name: Amazon ECR Registry
nodes.notes: Stores completed application docker images ready for deployment.

nodes.name: AWS CloudFormation
nodes.notes: Executes deployment in three steps: ChangeSet, Approve, and Execute to deploy templates.

nodes.name: Customer VPC
nodes.notes: Isolated network environment deployed for each customer.

nodes.name: Amazon ECS
nodes.notes: Runs the containerized applications defined in task definitions.

nodes.name: Application Load Balancer
nodes.notes: Routes external traffic to the ECS container tasks.

nodes.name: AWS IAM
nodes.notes: Defines access permissions and execution roles for deployed applications.

edges.notes: Developer pushes code changes to git repository.
CodeBuild outputs built container image to ECR.
CloudFormation deploys and configures the target customer VPC environment.
CloudFormation updates or instantiates ECS task definitions.
CloudFormation provisions or modifies the Application Load Balancer.
CloudFormation applies IAM roles and permission policies.
